---
title: "Working Paper"
subtitle: "Sigmoid Analytica CRM & Commercial Strategy — an evidence-building enquiry"
---

> **This is a working paper, not a report.** It states open questions and the evidence needed to
> answer them. It deliberately reaches **no final conclusions** at v0.1. The source proposal is
> treated as **Hypothesis v0.1** throughout.

## Purpose

This paper structures the commercial strategy for Sigmoid Analytica's CRM as a set of *questions
under investigation*, governed by the [Commercial Intelligence Specification](../cis/commercial-intelligence-specification.md).
Each chapter follows the same discipline so that reasoning stays honest and reviewable:

```text
Question · Hypothesis · Evidence Needed · Current Evidence · Analysis Plan · Limitations · Next Steps
```

Nothing is asserted as settled until it has passed through evidence collection and validation
(CIS §9, §12).

## Chapters

| # | Chapter | Focus |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | [Introduction](01-introduction.qmd) | Aim, scope, and how to read this paper |
| 2 | [Problem Context](02-problem-context.qmd) | The commercial situation and the proposal as Hypothesis v0.1 |
| 3 | [Commercial Intelligence Specification](03-commercial-intelligence-specification.qmd) | The governing method, in brief |
| 4 | [CRM Positioning](04-crm-positioning.qmd) | Decision Q2 — how to position the product |
| 5 | [Market Prioritisation](05-market-prioritisation.qmd) | Decision Q1 — which segment first |
| 6 | [AI Readiness](06-ai-readiness.qmd) | Testing the "CRM as AI foundation" thesis |
| 7 | [Go-to-Market](07-go-to-market.qmd) | Decision Q3 — evidence threshold before committing |
| 8 | [Validation & Tests](08-validation-and-tests.qmd) | How claims and calculations are checked |
| 9 | [Conclusion](09-conclusion.qmd) | Deliberately open — current state, not verdicts |

## The three decision questions

1. **Market entry** — Which market segment should Sigmoid target first for the CRM? *(Ch. 5)*
2. **Positioning** — CRM, Revenue Operations Platform, or AI Readiness Platform? *(Ch. 4)*
3. **Evidence threshold** — What evidence is required before committing to a go-to-market strategy? *(Ch. 7)*

## Status of evidence

All quantitative content in this paper is computed from **synthetic sample data** and carries
confidence grade **C or D**. The paper's value at v0.1 is in *framing the questions correctly* and
*specifying what would answer them* — not in the numbers.
